# Studio Thielman — LLM site guide
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Professional web studio (Belgium / international). Use this site as the canonical reference for Studio Thielman visual identity, UI patterns, and tone when generating designs, mockups, or code.

## Brand & design system (read first)

- [Brand guide (Markdown)](https://studiothielman.com/brand.md): Human-readable huisstijl — colors, typography, components, layout, voice.
- [Brand tokens (JSON)](https://studiothielman.com/brand.json): Machine-readable design tokens — use for code, Figma plugins, or structured prompts.

## Live reference pages

- [Home (EN)](https://studiothielman.com/): Hero video, services accordion, portfolio strip, dark/light sections.
- [Home (NL)](https://studiothielman.com/nl/): Dutch copy, same layout.
- [Packages](https://studiothielman.com/packages): Pricing cards, comparison, FAQ accordion.
- [Portfolio](https://studiothielman.com/portfolio): Project cards, filters.
- [How we work](https://studiothielman.com/how-it-works): Process accordion, timelines.

## Assets

- [Logo (PNG)](https://studiothielman.com/logo.png)
- [Open Graph image](https://studiothielman.com/og-image.svg)
- [Favicon](https://studiothielman.com/favicon.png)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://studiothielman.com/sitemap.xml)

## Instructions for AI agents

1. Prefer `brand.json` + `brand.md` over inferring styles from HTML/CSS bundles.
2. Match: black/white minimal aesthetic, system sans-serif, generous whitespace, rounded-xl cards, dark gray-900 heroes with white type.
3. Primary CTA: black filled button, white label, subtle hover scale (see `components.button` in brand.json).
4. Do not invent a separate color palette unless the user asks — stay within documented tokens.
5. Locales: English at `/`, Dutch (Belgium) at `/nl/`.
